title: Mocha Almond Chia Pudding
description: A make-ahead chocolate-coffee chia breakfast with hemp seeds, almonds, granola, and blueberries.
steps: Whisk the almond milk, cocoa powder, coffee, and optional maple syrup in a jar until smooth.
Stir in the chia seeds and hemp seeds. Wait five minutes, stir again to break up any clumps, then cover.
Refrigerate for at least four hours or overnight.
Before eating, stir well and top with granola, chopped almonds, and blueberries.
notes: The quantities listed are for one serving.
For meal preparation, multiply the chia mixture by four and divide it among four jars.
Keep the granola and almonds separate until serving so they remain crisp.
Use decaffeinated coffee powder if preferred.
